title: Orders — full workflow map

script.voiceover: Orders in five steps. Same shape every time, whether it's a lab, a med, or imaging.
Step one. Confirm the patient banner and the encounter you're in. Wrong encounter is the number one cause of orders landing in the wrong place.
Step two. Open Orders or Order Entry from the chart sidebar. If you don't see it, check your role and department context.
Step three. Pick the order type. Lab, medication, imaging, referral. Search by name, then select the specific orderable.
Step four. Review details. Priority, frequency, dose, indication. Anything red or starred is required before sign.
Step five. Sign, or route for cosign if you're not the responsible provider. If sign fails, the system will tell you exactly which field is missing.
That's the full order workflow. Confirm, open, choose, review, sign.

visual_scenes: Title card: Orders — full workflow
Mock chart header: patient banner + encounter selector highlighted
Mock sidebar with 'Orders' item highlighted
Order-type picker with Lab / Med / Imaging tiles
Order detail panel with required fields starred

End card: 5-step recap
notes: Mizly-original script. Do not reuse source narration verbatim. Visuals must be Mizly-created mocks, no source screen recording.

title: Notes — where to write and sign

script.voiceover: Notes follow the same five-step shape as orders. Here's where to write one and how to sign it.
Step one. Confirm the chart and the encounter. The note attaches to whatever encounter is open right now.
Step two. Open Notes or Documentation from the chart sidebar. If Notes is missing, your role or department context is wrong.
Step three. Choose the note type. Progress, H&P, procedure, discharge. Each type controls which template and required fields load.
Step four. Complete every required section. Required fields are starred and the editor will not let you sign until they're filled.
Step five. Sign, or route for cosign. If sign fails, read the inline error — it names the exact missing field.
Confirm, open, choose, complete, sign. Same shape, every note.

visual_scenes: Title card: Notes — where to write and sign
Mock chart header with encounter selector
Mock sidebar with Notes / Documentation highlighted
Note-type picker grid
Note editor with required section starred
Sign button + 'required field missing' inline error
End card: 5-step recap
notes: Mizly-original script. Mirrors the Orders clip's 5-step shape so learners build one mental model.

title: SmartTools — SmartLink blank or wrong

script.voiceover: SmartLink blank or pulling the wrong info? Work this in four checks before you escalate.
Check one. Patient and encounter context. SmartLinks pull from the chart you're in. Wrong chart, wrong data.
Check two. Refresh, or delete and reinsert the SmartLink. A stale insert won't pick up new data until it re-resolves.
Check three. Required prompts. Some SmartLinks need a date range, a result type, or a user pick before they return anything.
Check four. If it's a shared template or shared SmartTool and still blank, it's a build issue. Capture the SmartLink name and route to the documentation or template owner.
Context, refresh, prompt, owner. Four checks, then escalate.

visual_scenes: Title card: SmartLink blank or wrong
Note editor with patient banner + encounter highlighted
SmartLink token shown blank, then refresh action
Prompt dialog with required field starred
Escalation card with SmartLink name + owner route
End card: 4-step recap
